Work / UI/UX

UI/UX

Enterprise information architecture, design systems, and product design.

Case studies

  • AMD

    AMD Global Navigation IA Redesign

    Enterprise-scale navigation and information architecture for AMD.com and product hubs.
  • AMD

    AMD AI Developer Program Dark Data Table

    Dark-theme data table and filtering for the AI Developer Program resource library.
  • Fortune 100

    Enterprise Design System Components

    Component library and documentation for a Fortune 100 design system.
  • AMD

    AMD.com SEO Audit Tool

    Internal tool for SEO audit and content discovery across AMD properties.
